_comment: Authoritative, hand-curated npcId -> {race, gender} entries. These take precedence over anything the generator infers from the full NPC summary. NPC ids here are RuneLite/OSRS cache ids (the same ids the live client reports via NPCComposition#getId and the osrsreboxed npcs-summary.json), verified against the osrs cache. Add high-traffic named dialogue NPCs whose gender/race cannot be read off the name (Hans, Cook, Bob), and any corrections. Race must be one of: Human, Elf, Dwarf, Goblin, Gnome, Monkey, Gorilla, Troll, Undead, Demon, Wizard, Tortugan. Gender must be Male or Female. The optional 'ethnicity' field sets (or, by omission, clears) the NPC's ethnicity accent: set it to a byEthnicity key to correct where an NPC is from (e.g. Ak-Haranu -> easternlands), or omit it to drop a wrong ethnicity the wiki inferred from where the NPC is found (e.g. a foreigner in Morytania who should not sound Morytanian). The optional 'name' field is documentation only and is ignored by the generator.
